verification_approved: Your account has been verified! You can now {action_text}.
verification_rejected: Your verification was not approved. Reason: {reason}. Please re-upload your documents.
booking_received: New booking request! {trucker_name} wants to book your load: {origin} → {destination}.
booking_approved: Your booking has been approved! Load: {origin} → {destination}. You can start your trip.
booking_rejected: Your booking was not approved by the supplier. Load: {origin} → {destination}. You can book other loads.
load_expired: Your load has expired: {origin} → {destination}. Post a new load to find truckers.
super_load_assigned: A trucker has been assigned to your Super Load: {origin} → {destination}. Trucker: {trucker_name}.
payment_reminder: Payment reminder: Super Load {origin} → {destination}. Remaining payment due in {days_remaining} days.
